title: Le Trou
tmdbOverview: Four prison inmates have been hatching a plan to literally dig out of jail when another prisoner, Claude Gaspard, is moved into their cell. They take a risk and share their plan with the newcomer. Over the course of three days, the prisoners and friends break through the concrete floor using a bed post and begin to make their way through the sewer system – yet their escape is anything but assured.
synopsis: Released in 1960, Le Trou is a drama, thriller and crime film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1960s and genre rankings. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
